channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 11.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer says tech firms must stop children receiving or sending naked images or face new laws - UK politics live
item.description: Starmer says tech firms must stop children receiving or sending naked images or face new laws - UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Social media ban latest: Starmer demands tech companies clamp down to protect children
item.description: Social media ban latest: Starmer demands tech companies clamp down to protect children

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Andy Burnham shares footage of man tearing down campaign posters ahead of Makerfield by-election
item.description: Andy Burnham shares footage of man tearing down campaign posters ahead of Makerfield by-election

item.title: Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: Keir Starmer’s speech on nudity apps encapsulates much of Labour’s MPs frustration with him. “Ultimatums” rather than action. Talk big, act small. Perhaps you then eventually do act big but not without losing an awf...
item.description: Keir Starmer’s speech on nudity apps encapsulates much of Labour’s MPs frustration with him. “Ultimatums” rather than action. Talk big, act small. Perhaps you then eventually do act big but not without losing an awf...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: How would Starmer’s social media ban for under-16s work in the UK?
item.description: How would Starmer’s social media ban for under-16s work in the UK?

item.title: i Politics: The 'mistake' that could jeopardise Burnham's hopes of becoming PM
item.description: The 'mistake' that could jeopardise Burnham's hopes of becoming PM

item.title: Reuters: UK PM Starmer set to ban 'harmful' social media for under-16s - Reuters
item.description: UK PM Starmer set to ban 'harmful' social media for under-16s - Reuters

item.title: The Guardian: Starmer gives tech firms ultimatum to block explicit images on children’s phones - The Guardian
item.description: Starmer gives tech firms ultimatum to block explicit images on children’s phones - The Guardian

item.title: Reuters: Clashes in Pakistan-administered Kashmir kill 11 ahead of protest - Reuters
item.description: Clashes in Pakistan-administered Kashmir kill 11 ahead of protest - Reuters

item.title: The Telegraph: Hegseth’s D-Day migrant speech lacked class, says minister - The Telegraph
item.description: Hegseth’s D-Day migrant speech lacked class, says minister - The Telegraph
